1.notes: Starter database of 45 yarns built in index.html YARNS array, each with brand, name, weight class, fiber %s, yards, grams, typical gauge, machine-washable flag, and price tier 1-3. Specs are approximate/per-ball — accuracy review tracked under task 30.

2.notes: WEIGHTS (8 classes Lace→Super Bulky), FIBERS (11 fibers), and FAMILY mapping (animal/plant/synthetic) defined at index.html:194-198.

3.notes: score() at index.html:252-256 — same weight class = 35 pts, adjacent = 17 pts, returns null (excluded) when >1 class apart.

4.notes: Yards-per-gram thickness term at index.html:258-261, up to 25 pts, scaled by relative difference (25 * (1 - diff*3)).

5.notes: Gauge term at index.html:263-264: 15 - 3*|gaugeDiff| when both known; 8 pts neutral credit when target/candidate gauge missing.

6.notes: Fiber term at index.html:266-276: 60% exact-fiber overlap + 40% family overlap, scaled to 20 pts. wool and merino treated as near-equivalent for the exact match.

7.notes: Care term at index.html:278-279: 5 pts unless the target is machine-washable and the candidate is not (only that loss is penalized).

8.notes: whyText() at index.html:284-294 builds the plain-language rationale per card (weight class, thickness % delta, fiber character, machine-wash warning).

9.notes: Pick mode: yarnSelect dropdown populated and alpha-sorted in init() (index.html:377-381); getTarget() reads the selected yarn (line 316).

10.notes: Specs mode form (index.html:120-152) with weight, yards/ball, grams/ball, optional gauge, main fiber + %, machine-wash checkbox; parsed in getTarget() (lines 317-329).

11.notes: Care, price-tier, and fiber-family filters (index.html:154-180) applied in findSubs() (lines 339-341).

12.notes: setTab() at index.html:307-313 toggles pick/specs panels and active tab styling.

13.notes: Responsive grid/card collapse at ≤700px via media queries (index.html:61, 81).

14.notes: findSubs() (index.html:331-373) scores, filters to score ≥ 55, sorts desc, takes top 10, renders cards with great (≥80) / good badge and a circular score.

15.notes: buyLinks() at index.html:297-303 generates retailer search URLs (LoveCrafts, Hobbii, Amazon) from brand + name. Affiliate-link swap tracked under task 26.

16.notes: Empty-state panel rendered when no candidates pass filters (index.html:349-352).

17.notes: README.md present at project root — overview, how-it-works (scoring breakdown), roadmap, and gauge-swatch disclaimer.

18.notes: Prototype runs end-to-end as a single static index.html (no build step). Treated as informally smoke-tested at initial commit; formal cross-browser + edge-case testing tracked under tasks 28-29.

19.notes: Roadmap item, in progress. DB expanded to 45 yarns; thin classes filled out (Sport, Lace, Super Bulky each got verified additions sourced from manufacturer/retailer specs). Remaining: broaden coverage further and verify every legacy record against ball-band data (see task 30).

20.notes: Roadmap item. Add texture/halo descriptor fields (e.g. smooth, tweed, brushed/halo) to YARNS records to support drape-aware matching.

21.notes: Depends on task 20. Add a texture/halo term to score() and rebalance point weights so the totals still cap at 100.

22.notes: Validate scoring against a set of known-good real-world substitutions; tune the 35/25/20/15/5 weights and the thickness/gauge penalty slopes.

23.notes: Resolved: getTarget() now reads an explicit optional 'Secondary fiber' dropdown (sFiber2). The <100% remainder is assigned to the chosen secondary fiber, or left unaccounted when 'unknown' is selected — no more acrylic-or-wool guess.

24.notes: Resolved: validateSpecs() validates yards/grams (>0, sane upper bound), optional gauge (4-50 or blank), and main fiber % (1-100); offending fields get an .invalid outline and an inline error list is shown instead of silently substituting defaults.

25.notes: Accessibility pass: confirm every label is associated with its control, keyboard navigation/focus order works, and accent colours meet WCAG AA contrast against backgrounds.

26.notes: Roadmap item. Replace plain retailer search links with affiliate links and add click-through tracking.

27.notes: Roadmap item. Encode the target yarn + active filters into a shareable URL (query string / hash) and restore state on load.

28.notes: Manually verify layout and behaviour in Chrome, Firefox, Safari, and Edge.

29.notes: Exercise extremes: Lace and Super Bulky targets, custom specs with partial fiber %, and targets with no gauge supplied (neutral-credit path).

30.notes: Final accuracy review and sign-off of every yarn record against authoritative ball-band data before release.

31.notes: Roadmap item. Integrate live stock/price checking from retailers (likely needs a backend or third-party API — currently the app is fully static).

32.notes: Deploy the single-file app to a static host (GitHub Pages or Netlify). No build step required.

33.notes: Update README to reflect the final feature set once Draft 2 / Final items land (texture scoring, affiliate links, shareable URLs, deployment URL).

34.notes: Final QA sign-off on the deployed production build.
